mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5% signals weakening labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit margins and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and falling interest rates (FEDFUNDS) create a 'stagflationary' environment where equity valuations contract, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positively correlated with combined CPIAUCSL/FEDFUNDS signals in 60%+ of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates weakening supply-side capacity, leading to higher inflation and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO declines by 2%+ over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains (PAYEMS) signal robust corporate hiring, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negatively correlated with PAYEMS growth in 60%+ of non-exception periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 1,800 thousand units signals weak demand for construction, reducing corporate revenues and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST falls below 1,800 thousand units.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negatively correlated with combined GDPC1/RSAFS signals in 60%+ of non-exception periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in the federal funds rate above 5% signals monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 5%.
